# WebXC

> A strategic digital performance partner that makes established businesses clearly understood, trusted, and citable by both search engines and AI.

WebXC helps established New Zealand businesses close the gap between their real-world credibility and their digital presence, at a time when AI systems and search engines decide who gets found, trusted, and recommended.

## Services

- Discovery & Strategic Review: Structured discovery session producing prioritised strategic and tactical recommendations for your digital presence.
- Positioning & Content Optimisation: For businesses whose existing website is structurally adequate but whose positioning, content, and digital signals need calibrating for search and AI.
- Full Digital Foundation Build: Complete website design and technical build led by business strategy, structured for both search engines and generative AI.
- Ongoing Content & Visibility: Sustained strategic content development, authority building, and AI visibility monitoring.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.webxc.com
- Email: james@xennial.co.nz
- Location: New Zealand
